---
title: "PracticalBayes vs Turing.jl — Benchmark Report"
subtitle: "Auto-generated from bench/results/*.jsonl — do not edit by hand"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
---

Latest PracticalBayes run: **2026-07-07T13:21:58.403**, commit `5bda4dd2`.
  
Latest Turing reference: **2026-07-07T11:47:22.671**, commit `5846bced`.

Timings report **first-call** (includes JIT compilation) separately from **steady-state median** — see `bench/suite.jl` for methodology (hand-rolled fixed-repetition timing, not BenchmarkTools/Chairmarks, so expensive configurations still get a real sample size instead of degenerating to N=1).

## Latest snapshot

### Layer: `logdensity`

| Model | Shape | Backend | PB Float64 | PB Float32 | Turing | F32/F64 | PB(F64)/Turing | PB(F32)/Turing |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| normal | large | none | 1.229 ms | 1.088 ms | 689.6 µs | 0.89× | 1.78× | 1.58× |
| normal | tiny | none | 0.6 µs | 0.65 µs | 0.5 µs | 1.08× | 1.2× | 1.3× |
| poisson | k5_n2000 | none | 189.05 µs | — | 159.95 µs | — | 1.18× | — |
| poisson | k5_n50000 | none | 5.398 ms | — | 4.19 ms | — | 1.29× | — |

### Layer: `logdensity_raw`

| Model | Shape | Backend | PB Float64 | PB Float32 | Turing | F32/F64 | PB(F64)/Turing | PB(F32)/Turing |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| normal | large | none | 1.453 ms | 1.413 ms | — | 0.97× | — | — |
| normal | tiny | none | 0.6 µs | 0.7 µs | — | 1.17× | — | — |
| poisson | k5_n2000 | none | 202.2 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| poisson | k5_n50000 | none | 4.712 ms | — | — | — | — | — |

### Layer: `gradient`

| Model | Shape | Backend | PB Float64 | PB Float32 | Turing | F32/F64 | PB(F64)/Turing | PB(F32)/Turing |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| manyparam | K200_N2000 | ForwardDiff | 51.433 ms | 32.983 ms | 26.815 ms | 0.64× | 1.92× | 1.23× |
| normal | large | ForwardDiff | 1.803 ms | 1.978 ms | 657.4 µs | 1.1× | 2.74× | 3.01× |
| normal | tiny | ForwardDiff | 1.4 µs | 1.3 µs | 0.5 µs | 0.93× | 2.8× | 2.6× |

### Layer: `nuts`

| Model | Shape | Backend | PB Float64 | PB Float32 | Turing | F32/F64 | PB(F64)/Turing | PB(F32)/Turing |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| normal | large | ForwardDiff | 2207.828 ms | 2319.065 ms | 1914.286 ms | 1.05× | 1.15× | 1.21× |
| normal | tiny | ForwardDiff | 6.795 ms | 6.649 ms | 11.202 ms | 0.98× | 0.61× | 0.59× |

## History (regression tracking)

Series with more than one recorded run (steady-state median, PracticalBayes side):

### `gradient` / manyparam / K200_N2000 / Float32 / ForwardDiff

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 38.213 ms | 36.526 ms |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 32.983 ms | 31.078 ms |

### `gradient` / manyparam / K200_N2000 / Float64 / ForwardDiff

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 56.68 ms | 70.049 ms |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 51.433 ms | 53.917 ms |

### `gradient` / normal / large / Float32 / ForwardDiff

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 998.2 µs | 972.1 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 1.978 ms | 1.052 ms |

### `gradient` / normal / large / Float64 / ForwardDiff

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 975.95 µs | 1.019 ms |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 1.803 ms | 1.971 ms |

### `gradient` / normal / tiny / Float32 / ForwardDiff

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 0.8 µs | 8.4 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 1.3 µs | 22.9 µs |

### `gradient` / normal / tiny / Float64 / ForwardDiff

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 0.6 µs | 22.4 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 1.4 µs | 14.1 µs |

### `logdensity` / normal / large / Float32 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 587.05 µs | 577.0 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 1.088 ms | 784.9 µs |

### `logdensity` / normal / large / Float64 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 866.4 µs | 791.5 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 1.229 ms | 1.289 ms |

### `logdensity` / normal / tiny / Float32 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 0.65 µs | 2.6 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 0.65 µs | 3.1 µs |

### `logdensity` / normal / tiny / Float64 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 0.5 µs | 4.0 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 0.6 µs | 2.8 µs |

### `logdensity` / poisson / k5_n2000 / Float64 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 215.7 µs | 223.4 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 189.05 µs | 357.5 µs |

### `logdensity` / poisson / k5_n50000 / Float64 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 5.633 ms | 3.496 ms |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 5.398 ms | 5.526 ms |

### `logdensity_raw` / normal / large / Float32 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 686.85 µs | 710.4 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 1.413 ms | 1.138 ms |

### `logdensity_raw` / normal / large / Float64 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 687.65 µs | 739.6 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 1.453 ms | 1.564 ms |

### `logdensity_raw` / normal / tiny / Float32 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 0.5 µs | 2.2 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 0.7 µs | 2.3 µs |

### `logdensity_raw` / normal / tiny / Float64 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 0.4 µs | 2.2 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 0.6 µs | 4.2 µs |

### `logdensity_raw` / poisson / k5_n2000 / Float64 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 163.2 µs | 184.9 µs |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 202.2 µs | 224.8 µs |

### `logdensity_raw` / poisson / k5_n50000 / Float64 / none

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 3.405 ms | 4.757 ms |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 4.712 ms | 4.102 ms |

### `nuts` / normal / large / Float32 / ForwardDiff

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 1565.252 ms | 3905.356 ms |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 2319.065 ms | 6095.173 ms |

### `nuts` / normal / large / Float64 / ForwardDiff

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 1422.813 ms | 3393.008 ms |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 2207.828 ms | 6472.94 ms |

### `nuts` / normal / tiny / Float32 / ForwardDiff

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 6.716 ms | 4328.535 ms |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 6.649 ms | 8193.635 ms |

### `nuts` / normal / tiny / Float64 / ForwardDiff

| Timestamp | Commit | Median | First-call |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 2026-07-07T11:41:53.543 | `5846bced` | 2.986 ms | 5163.325 ms |
| 2026-07-07T13:21:58.403 | `5bda4dd2` | 6.795 ms | 8545.689 ms |

## Model corpus benchmarks

Latest PracticalBayes corpus run: **2026-07-08T08:02:02.343**, commit `d97a3f37`, 55 distinct models.
  
Latest Turing corpus run (representative subset): **2026-07-08T07:45:20.664**, commit `d97a3f37`, 20 distinct models.

Every model in `bench/corpus/posteriordb/` and `bench/corpus/tutorials/` (see `bench/corpus_bench.jl`), across ForwardDiff/Mooncake/Enzyme (ReverseDiff dropped entirely — redundant with Mooncake), Float64 and Float32, on three layers: logdensity, gradient, and a 500-sample NUTS run (250 adaptation steps discarded, matching Turing's own default `n_adapts = N÷2` resolution so both sides run the same total number of transitions) — NUTS is now swept across every AD backend too, not just ForwardDiff. Turing only covers a representative subset (~20 models spanning each structural family — porting all ~55 to Turing as well was judged not worth the effort vs. the coverage gained). Each model runs in its own subprocess (`bench/corpus_bench_worker.jl`), so one model crashing (Enzyme has genuinely done this on certain type combinations) only loses that model's results, not the whole sweep.

### Corpus layer: `logdensity`

| Corpus | Model | Backend | PB Float64 | PB Float32 | Turing | F32/F64 | PB(F64)/Turing | PB(F32)/Turing |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| posteriordb | GLM_Poisson | none | 1.95 µs | 1.6 µs | 1.75 µs | 0.82× | 1.11× | 0.91× |
| posteriordb | Rate_1 | none | 0.45 µs | 0.5 µs | 0.65 µs | 1.11× | 0.69× | 0.77× |
| posteriordb | blr | none | 1.0 µs | 0.9 µs | 1.1 µs | 0.9× | 0.91× | 0.82× |
| posteriordb | dugongs | none | 1.05 µs | 1.1 µs | 1.3 µs | 1.05× | 0.81× | 0.85× |
| posteriordb | earn_height | none | 3.35 µs | 3.45 µs | — | 1.03× | — | — |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_centered | none | 0.75 µs | 0.8 µs | 1.4 µs | 1.07× | 0.54× | 0.57× |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_noncentered | none | 0.75 µs | 1.7 µs | — | 2.27× | — | — |
| posteriordb | kidscore_interaction | none | 4.15 µs | 4.9 µs | 0.95 µs | 1.18× | 4.37× | 5.16× |
| posteriordb | log10earn_height | none | 3.55 µs | 3.45 µs | — | 0.97× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_height_male | none | 4.6 µs | 4.0 µs | — | 0.87× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_interaction | none | 3.75 µs | 3.9 µs | — | 1.04× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_interaction_z | none | 4.4 µs | 13.95 µs | — | 3.17× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_logheight_male | none | 7.6 µs | 6.3 µs | — | 0.83× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logistic_regression_rhs | none | 11.95 µs | 10.15 µs | 5.25 µs | 0.85× | 2.28× | 1.93× |
| posteriordb | logmesquite | none | 6.65 µs | 9.7 µs | — | 1.46× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logva | none | 5.9 µs | 4.7 µs | — | 0.8× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvas | none | 7.0 µs | 8.1 µs | — | 1.16× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvash | none | 7.35 µs | 7.25 µs | — | 0.99× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvolume | none | 4.1 µs | 4.95 µs | — | 1.21× | — | — |
| posteriordb | mesquite | none | 4.5 µs | 4.9 µs | — | 1.09× | — | — |
| posteriordb | nes | none | 7.2 µs | 5.2 µs | — | 0.72× | — | — |
| posteriordb | pilots | none | 1.1 µs | 1.0 µs | 2.25 µs | 0.91× | 0.49× | 0.44× |
| posteriordb | radon_county | none | 0.7 µs | 0.85 µs | — | 1.21× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_county_intercept | none | 0.9 µs | 0.8 µs | — | 0.89× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_hierarchical_intercept_centered | none | 1.4 µs | 1.8 µs | — | 1.29× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_hierarchical_intercept_noncentered | none | 1.9 µs | 1.6 µs | — | 0.84× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_partially_pooled_centered | none | 1.7 µs | 0.9 µs | — | 0.53× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_pooled | none | 0.6 µs | 0.65 µs | — | 1.08× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_centered | none | 1.55 µs | 1.0 µs | — | 0.65× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_noncentered | none | 1.0 µs | 1.3 µs | — | 1.3× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_slope_centered | none | 1.85 µs | 1.4 µs | 2.4 µs | 0.76× | 0.77× | 0.58× |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_slope_noncentered | none | 1.5 µs | 2.35 µs | — | 1.57× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_slope_centered | none | 1.3 µs | 0.95 µs | — | 0.73× | — | — |
| posteriordb | rats | none | 2.45 µs | 1.55 µs | 1.55 µs | 0.63× | 1.58× | 1.0× |
| posteriordb | seeds | none | 3.45 µs | 4.3 µs | 4.25 µs | 1.25× | 0.81× | 1.01× |
| posteriordb | seeds_centered | none | 3.95 µs | 4.25 µs | — | 1.08× | — | — |
| posteriordb | seeds_stanified | none | 5.45 µs | 7.6 µs | — | 1.39× | — | — |
| posteriordb | sesame_one_pred_a | none | 4.3 µs | 3.15 µs | — | 0.73× | — | — |
| posteriordb | surgical_model | none | 2.2 µs | 2.35 µs | — | 1.07× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_daae_c | none | 8.5 µs | 19.35 µs | — | 2.28× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae | none | 7.65 µs | 16.85 µs | 3.2 µs | 2.2× | 2.39× | 5.27× |
| posteriordb | wells_dae_c | none | 10.7 µs | 8.5 µs | — | 0.79× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae_inter | none | 8.05 µs | 9.2 µs | — | 1.14× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist | none | 6.05 µs | 5.15 µs | — | 0.85× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist100 | none | 2.7 µs | 2.3 µs | — | 0.85× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist100ars | none | 6.25 µs | 6.85 µs | — | 1.1× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_interaction | none | 6.3 µs | 6.9 µs | — | 1.1× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_interaction_c | none | 7.35 µs | 7.9 µs | — | 1.07× | — | — |
| tutorials | bayesian-linear-regression | none | 0.85 µs | 1.5 µs | 1.1 µs | 1.76× | 0.77× | 1.36× |
| tutorials | bayesian-logistic-regression | none | 3.55 µs | 1.45 µs | 2.35 µs | 0.41× | 1.51× | 0.62× |
| tutorials | bayesian-poisson-regression | none | 2.95 µs | 1.65 µs | 2.45 µs | 0.56× | 1.2× | 0.67× |
| tutorials | bayesian-time-series-analysis | none | 0.7 µs | 1.2 µs | — | 1.71× | — | — |
| tutorials | coin-flipping | none | 1.55 µs | 1.25 µs | 1.9 µs | 0.81× | 0.82× | 0.66× |
| tutorials | multinomial-logistic-regression | none | 13.95 µs | 7.05 µs | 17.95 µs | 0.51× | 0.78× | 0.39× |
| tutorials | probabilistic-pca | none | 4.05 µs | 3.9 µs | 3.55 µs | 0.96× | 1.14× | 1.1× |

### Corpus layer: `gradient`

| Corpus | Model | Backend | PB Float64 | PB Float32 | Turing | F32/F64 | PB(F64)/Turing | PB(F32)/Turing |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| posteriordb | GLM_Poisson | Enzyme | 4.9 µs | — | 6.25 µs | — | 0.78× | — |
| posteriordb | GLM_Poisson | ForwardDiff | 2.8 µs | 2.05 µs | 2.6 µs | 0.73× | 1.08× | 0.79× |
| posteriordb | GLM_Poisson | Mooncake | 9.6 µs | 18.05 µs | 7.15 µs | 1.88× | 1.34× | 2.52× |
| posteriordb | Rate_1 | Enzyme | 1.25 µs | — | 1.2 µs | — | 1.04× | — |
| posteriordb | Rate_1 | ForwardDiff | 0.7 µs | 0.8 µs | 0.6 µs | 1.14× | 1.17× | 1.33× |
| posteriordb | Rate_1 | Mooncake | 1.85 µs | 2.55 µs | 1.15 µs | 1.38× | 1.61× | 2.22× |
| posteriordb | blr | Enzyme | 7.1 µs | 8.1 µs | 3.7 µs | 1.14× | 1.92× | 2.19× |
| posteriordb | blr | ForwardDiff | 1.8 µs | 1.5 µs | 1.55 µs | 0.83× | 1.16× | 0.97× |
| posteriordb | blr | Mooncake | 10.1 µs | — | 5.45 µs | — | 1.85× | — |
| posteriordb | dugongs | Enzyme | 5.45 µs | — | 6.5 µs | — | 0.84× | — |
| posteriordb | dugongs | ForwardDiff | 1.85 µs | 2.05 µs | 1.9 µs | 1.11× | 0.97× | 1.08× |
| posteriordb | dugongs | Mooncake | 5.8 µs | 6.6 µs | 6.6 µs | 1.14× | 0.88× | 1.0× |
| posteriordb | earn_height | Enzyme | 28.25 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | earn_height | ForwardDiff | 9.55 µs | 4.15 µs | — | 0.43× | — | — |
| posteriordb | earn_height | Mooncake | 59.85 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_centered | Enzyme | 4.9 µs | 6.15 µs | 9.95 µs | 1.26× | 0.49× | 0.62× |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_centered | ForwardDiff | 1.65 µs | 2.15 µs | 1.5 µs | 1.3× | 1.1× | 1.43× |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_centered | Mooncake | 5.5 µs | 7.65 µs | 5.9 µs | 1.39× | 0.93× | 1.3× |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_noncentered | Enzyme | 4.6 µs | 4.9 µs | — | 1.07× | — | — |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_noncentered | ForwardDiff | 2.85 µs | 1.85 µs | — | 0.65× | — | — |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_noncentered | Mooncake | 6.5 µs | 10.8 µs | — | 1.66× | — | — |
| posteriordb | kidscore_interaction | Enzyme | 74.0 µs | — | 3.05 µs | — | 24.26× | — |
| posteriordb | kidscore_interaction | ForwardDiff | 5.4 µs | 5.5 µs | 1.35 µs | 1.02× | 4.0× | 4.07× |
| posteriordb | kidscore_interaction | Mooncake | 109.35 µs | — | 7.05 µs | — | 15.51× | — |
| posteriordb | log10earn_height | Enzyme | 27.7 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | log10earn_height | ForwardDiff | 4.5 µs | 3.75 µs | — | 0.83× | — | — |
| posteriordb | log10earn_height | Mooncake | 69.0 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_height_male | Enzyme | 47.7 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_height_male | ForwardDiff | 5.7 µs | 4.95 µs | — | 0.87× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_height_male | Mooncake | 73.7 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_interaction | Enzyme | 52.4 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_interaction | ForwardDiff | 5.9 µs | 5.35 µs | — | 0.91× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_interaction | Mooncake | 121.9 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_interaction_z | Enzyme | 48.05 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_interaction_z | ForwardDiff | 6.2 µs | 5.5 µs | — | 0.89× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_interaction_z | Mooncake | 94.6 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_logheight_male | Enzyme | 45.8 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_logheight_male | ForwardDiff | 5.25 µs | 5.55 µs | — | 1.06× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_logheight_male | Mooncake | 106.05 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logistic_regression_rhs | Enzyme | 69.9 µs | — | 20.3 µs | — | 3.44× | — |
| posteriordb | logistic_regression_rhs | ForwardDiff | 30.05 µs | 24.0 µs | 11.05 µs | 0.8× | 2.72× | 2.17× |
| posteriordb | logistic_regression_rhs | Mooncake | 146.15 µs | — | 27.5 µs | — | 5.31× | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite | Enzyme | 90.7 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite | ForwardDiff | 13.5 µs | 8.7 µs | — | 0.64× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite | Mooncake | 149.15 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logva | Enzyme | 43.5 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logva | ForwardDiff | 7.3 µs | 7.0 µs | — | 0.96× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logva | Mooncake | 96.35 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvas | Enzyme | 85.05 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvas | ForwardDiff | 9.1 µs | 9.75 µs | — | 1.07× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvas | Mooncake | 141.2 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvash | Enzyme | 73.6 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvash | ForwardDiff | 14.6 µs | 9.05 µs | — | 0.62× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvash | Mooncake | 120.5 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvolume | Enzyme | 26.55 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvolume | ForwardDiff | 4.4 µs | 4.35 µs | — | 0.99× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvolume | Mooncake | 67.75 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | mesquite | Enzyme | 69.65 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | mesquite | ForwardDiff | 6.1 µs | 6.75 µs | — | 1.11× | — | — |
| posteriordb | mesquite | Mooncake | 158.75 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | nes | Enzyme | 100.25 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | nes | ForwardDiff | 8.3 µs | 8.0 µs | — | 0.96× | — | — |
| posteriordb | nes | Mooncake | 187.85 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | pilots | Enzyme | 7.7 µs | — | 7.35 µs | — | 1.05× | — |
| posteriordb | pilots | ForwardDiff | 7.45 µs | 5.8 µs | 7.6 µs | 0.78× | 0.98× | 0.76× |
| posteriordb | pilots | Mooncake | 12.85 µs | 14.5 µs | 14.75 µs | 1.13× | 0.87× | 0.98× |
| posteriordb | radon_county | Enzyme | 7.35 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_county | ForwardDiff | 3.1 µs | 2.1 µs | — | 0.68× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_county | Mooncake | 16.4 µs | 9.05 µs | — | 0.55× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_county_intercept | Enzyme | 5.8 µs | 6.45 µs | — | 1.11× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_county_intercept | ForwardDiff | 3.3 µs | 4.1 µs | — | 1.24× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_county_intercept | Mooncake | 9.05 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_hierarchical_intercept_centered | Enzyme | 12.15 µs | 11.45 µs | — | 0.94× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_hierarchical_intercept_centered | ForwardDiff | 40.85 µs | 27.25 µs | — | 0.67× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_hierarchical_intercept_centered | Mooncake | 18.3 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_hierarchical_intercept_noncentered | Enzyme | 14.75 µs | 11.25 µs | — | 0.76× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_hierarchical_intercept_noncentered | ForwardDiff | 42.75 µs | 38.35 µs | — | 0.9× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_hierarchical_intercept_noncentered | Mooncake | 20.5 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_partially_pooled_centered | Enzyme | 8.3 µs | 8.3 µs | — | 1.0× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_partially_pooled_centered | ForwardDiff | 4.8 µs | 2.65 µs | — | 0.55× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_partially_pooled_centered | Mooncake | 15.55 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_pooled | Enzyme | 5.65 µs | 6.2 µs | — | 1.1× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_pooled | ForwardDiff | 1.7 µs | 1.45 µs | — | 0.85× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_pooled | Mooncake | 7.8 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_centered | Enzyme | 5.75 µs | 8.3 µs | — | 1.44× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_centered | ForwardDiff | 4.4 µs | 4.0 µs | — | 0.91× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_centered | Mooncake | 12.85 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_noncentered | Enzyme | 9.3 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_noncentered | ForwardDiff | 6.0 µs | 5.45 µs | — | 0.91× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_noncentered | Mooncake | 34.3 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_slope_centered | Enzyme | 8.75 µs | 9.2 µs | 15.8 µs | 1.05× | 0.55× | 0.58× |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_slope_centered | ForwardDiff | 10.7 µs | 9.95 µs | 13.0 µs | 0.93× | 0.82× | 0.77× |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_slope_centered | Mooncake | 15.5 µs | — | 19.35 µs | — | 0.8× | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_slope_noncentered | Enzyme | 14.45 µs | 10.4 µs | — | 0.72× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_slope_noncentered | ForwardDiff | 8.25 µs | 11.7 µs | — | 1.42× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_slope_noncentered | Mooncake | 25.6 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_slope_centered | Enzyme | 6.0 µs | 13.5 µs | — | 2.25× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_slope_centered | ForwardDiff | 4.05 µs | 3.6 µs | — | 0.89× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_slope_centered | Mooncake | 11.55 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | rats | Enzyme | 21.9 µs | 16.65 µs | 7.45 µs | 0.76× | 2.94× | 2.23× |
| posteriordb | rats | ForwardDiff | 7.35 µs | 5.9 µs | 6.35 µs | 0.8× | 1.16× | 0.93× |
| posteriordb | rats | Mooncake | 16.7 µs | 18.05 µs | 9.65 µs | 1.08× | 1.73× | 1.87× |
| posteriordb | seeds | Enzyme | 18.55 µs | 17.9 µs | 25.3 µs | 0.96× | 0.73× | 0.71× |
| posteriordb | seeds | ForwardDiff | 14.65 µs | 14.95 µs | 18.9 µs | 1.02× | 0.78× | 0.79× |
| posteriordb | seeds | Mooncake | 20.6 µs | 20.05 µs | 23.3 µs | 0.97× | 0.88× | 0.86× |
| posteriordb | seeds_centered | Enzyme | 26.35 µs | 20.9 µs | — | 0.79× | — | — |
| posteriordb | seeds_centered | ForwardDiff | 16.45 µs | 15.65 µs | — | 0.95× | — | — |
| posteriordb | seeds_centered | Mooncake | 34.7 µs | 32.5 µs | — | 0.94× | — | — |
| posteriordb | seeds_stanified | Enzyme | 21.5 µs | 40.75 µs | — | 1.9× | — | — |
| posteriordb | seeds_stanified | ForwardDiff | 18.25 µs | 18.65 µs | — | 1.02× | — | — |
| posteriordb | seeds_stanified | Mooncake | 22.6 µs | 23.3 µs | — | 1.03× | — | — |
| posteriordb | sesame_one_pred_a | Enzyme | 22.55 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | sesame_one_pred_a | ForwardDiff | 3.85 µs | 3.95 µs | — | 1.03× | — | — |
| posteriordb | sesame_one_pred_a | Mooncake | 54.6 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | surgical_model | Enzyme | 12.5 µs | 14.25 µs | — | 1.14× | — | — |
| posteriordb | surgical_model | ForwardDiff | 6.3 µs | 5.7 µs | — | 0.9× | — | — |
| posteriordb | surgical_model | Mooncake | 17.55 µs | 15.85 µs | — | 0.9× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_daae_c | Enzyme | 90.95 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_daae_c | ForwardDiff | 14.05 µs | 18.6 µs | — | 1.32× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_daae_c | Mooncake | 164.2 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae | Enzyme | 51.8 µs | — | 17.6 µs | — | 2.94× | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae | ForwardDiff | 9.95 µs | 8.9 µs | 6.05 µs | 0.89× | 1.64× | 1.47× |
| posteriordb | wells_dae | Mooncake | 109.95 µs | — | 35.05 µs | — | 3.14× | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae_c | Enzyme | 58.15 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae_c | ForwardDiff | 13.95 µs | 10.3 µs | — | 0.74× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae_c | Mooncake | 134.15 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae_inter | Enzyme | 110.05 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae_inter | ForwardDiff | 14.6 µs | 13.4 µs | — | 0.92× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae_inter | Mooncake | 213.35 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist | Enzyme | 31.5 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist | ForwardDiff | 8.05 µs | 5.65 µs | — | 0.7× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist | Mooncake | 74.55 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist100 | Enzyme | 7.0 µs | 9.25 µs | — | 1.32× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist100 | ForwardDiff | 3.9 µs | 3.75 µs | — | 0.96× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist100 | Mooncake | 21.5 µs | 16.2 µs | — | 0.75× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist100ars | Enzyme | 40.45 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist100ars | ForwardDiff | 7.65 µs | 7.95 µs | — | 1.04× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist100ars | Mooncake | 88.35 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_interaction | Enzyme | 107.95 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_interaction | ForwardDiff | 9.3 µs | 9.85 µs | — | 1.06× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_interaction | Mooncake | 119.05 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_interaction_c | Enzyme | 146.75 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_interaction_c | ForwardDiff | 13.5 µs | 9.5 µs | — | 0.7× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_interaction_c | Mooncake | 108.8 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| tutorials | bayesian-linear-regression | Enzyme | 3.35 µs | 4.45 µs | 4.75 µs | 1.33× | 0.71× | 0.94× |
| tutorials | bayesian-linear-regression | ForwardDiff | 2.0 µs | 1.7 µs | 2.25 µs | 0.85× | 0.89× | 0.76× |
| tutorials | bayesian-linear-regression | Mooncake | 7.05 µs | — | 7.2 µs | — | 0.98× | — |
| tutorials | bayesian-logistic-regression | Enzyme | 5.8 µs | 6.4 µs | 7.2 µs | 1.1× | 0.81× | 0.89× |
| tutorials | bayesian-logistic-regression | ForwardDiff | 2.9 µs | 2.2 µs | 5.25 µs | 0.76× | 0.55× | 0.42× |
| tutorials | bayesian-logistic-regression | Mooncake | 33.85 µs | 9.75 µs | 13.4 µs | 0.29× | 2.53× | 0.73× |
| tutorials | bayesian-poisson-regression | Enzyme | 9.85 µs | 6.15 µs | 12.55 µs | 0.62× | 0.78× | 0.49× |
| tutorials | bayesian-poisson-regression | ForwardDiff | 5.4 µs | 7.75 µs | 3.8 µs | 1.44× | 1.42× | 2.04× |
| tutorials | bayesian-poisson-regression | Mooncake | 9.7 µs | 15.05 µs | 10.65 µs | 1.55× | 0.91× | 1.41× |
| tutorials | bayesian-time-series-analysis | Enzyme | 4.9 µs | 5.15 µs | — | 1.05× | — | — |
| tutorials | bayesian-time-series-analysis | ForwardDiff | 18.1 µs | 17.5 µs | — | 0.97× | — | — |
| tutorials | bayesian-time-series-analysis | Mooncake | 8.25 µs | — | — | — | — | — |
| tutorials | coin-flipping | Enzyme | 4.6 µs | — | 2.6 µs | — | 1.77× | — |
| tutorials | coin-flipping | ForwardDiff | 1.9 µs | 2.15 µs | 1.2 µs | 1.13× | 1.58× | 1.79× |
| tutorials | coin-flipping | Mooncake | 7.05 µs | 7.45 µs | 6.1 µs | 1.06× | 1.16× | 1.22× |
| tutorials | multinomial-logistic-regression | Enzyme | 49.9 µs | 55.85 µs | 68.9 µs | 1.12× | 0.72× | 0.81× |
| tutorials | multinomial-logistic-regression | ForwardDiff | 16.1 µs | 16.95 µs | 19.25 µs | 1.05× | 0.84× | 0.88× |
| tutorials | multinomial-logistic-regression | Mooncake | 101.8 µs | 73.85 µs | 81.85 µs | 0.73× | 1.24× | 0.9× |
| tutorials | probabilistic-pca | ForwardDiff | 51.45 µs | 67.5 µs | 54.7 µs | 1.31× | 0.94× | 1.23× |
| tutorials | probabilistic-pca | Mooncake | 55.2 µs | 36.2 µs | 34.85 µs | 0.66× | 1.58× | 1.04× |

### Corpus layer: `nuts`

| Corpus | Model | Backend | PB Float64 | PB Float32 | Turing | F32/F64 | PB(F64)/Turing | PB(F32)/Turing |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| posteriordb | GLM_Poisson | Enzyme | 94.082 ms | — | 132.869 ms | — | 0.71× | — |
| posteriordb | GLM_Poisson | ForwardDiff | 78.555 ms | 66.332 ms | 144.656 ms | 0.84× | 0.54× | 0.46× |
| posteriordb | GLM_Poisson | Mooncake | 154.578 ms | — | 216.124 ms | — | 0.72× | — |
| posteriordb | Rate_1 | Enzyme | 13.374 ms | — | 23.953 ms | — | 0.56× | — |
| posteriordb | Rate_1 | ForwardDiff | 9.002 ms | 9.355 ms | 24.56 ms | 1.04× | 0.37× | 0.38× |
| posteriordb | Rate_1 | Mooncake | 34.555 ms | — | 24.422 ms | — | 1.41× | — |
| posteriordb | blr | Enzyme | 78.375 ms | — | 68.182 ms | — | 1.15× | — |
| posteriordb | blr | ForwardDiff | 54.158 ms | 27.226 ms | 37.777 ms | 0.5× | 1.43× | 0.72× |
| posteriordb | blr | Mooncake | 74.23 ms | — | 116.237 ms | — | 0.64× | — |
| posteriordb | dugongs | Enzyme | 215.623 ms | — | 364.36 ms | — | 0.59× | — |
| posteriordb | dugongs | ForwardDiff | 111.881 ms | 145.865 ms | 168.795 ms | 1.3× | 0.66× | 0.86× |
| posteriordb | dugongs | Mooncake | 297.255 ms | — | 361.559 ms | — | 0.82× | — |
| posteriordb | earn_height | ForwardDiff | 1734.076 ms | 1626.885 ms | — | 0.94× | — | — |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_centered | Enzyme | 55.027 ms | — | 69.5 ms | — | 0.79× | — |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_centered | ForwardDiff | 59.476 ms | 48.67 ms | 75.243 ms | 0.82× | 0.79× | 0.65× |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_centered | Mooncake | 92.324 ms | — | 133.387 ms | — | 0.69× | — |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_noncentered | Enzyme | 117.224 ms | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_noncentered | ForwardDiff | 90.365 ms | 59.025 ms | — | 0.65× | — | — |
| posteriordb | eight_schools_noncentered | Mooncake | 150.481 ms | — | — | — | — | — |
| posteriordb | kidscore_interaction | Enzyme | 4013.071 ms | — | 736.199 ms | — | 5.45× | — |
| posteriordb | kidscore_interaction | ForwardDiff | 617.085 ms | 676.831 ms | 330.21 ms | 1.1× | 1.87× | 2.05× |
| posteriordb | kidscore_interaction | Mooncake | 7856.582 ms | — | 987.626 ms | — | 7.96× | — |
| posteriordb | log10earn_height | ForwardDiff | 18.342 ms | 57.748 ms | — | 3.15× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_height_male | ForwardDiff | 909.453 ms | 80.682 ms | — | 0.09× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_interaction | ForwardDiff | 50.6 ms | 971.336 ms | — | 19.2× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_interaction_z | ForwardDiff | 87.882 ms | 73.28 ms | — | 0.83× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logearn_logheight_male | ForwardDiff | 2163.126 ms | 2294.804 ms | — | 1.06× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logistic_regression_rhs | ForwardDiff | 306.703 ms | 315.714 ms | 355.452 ms | 1.03× | 0.86× | 0.89× |
| posteriordb | logmesquite | ForwardDiff | 291.292 ms | 277.306 ms | — | 0.95× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logva | ForwardDiff | 162.503 ms | 207.589 ms | — | 1.28× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvas | ForwardDiff | 357.994 ms | 403.03 ms | — | 1.13× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvash | ForwardDiff | 321.244 ms | 285.212 ms | — | 0.89× | — | — |
| posteriordb | logmesquite_logvolume | ForwardDiff | 117.628 ms | 90.077 ms | — | 0.77× | — | — |
| posteriordb | mesquite | ForwardDiff | 436.793 ms | 490.725 ms | — | 1.12× | — | — |
| posteriordb | nes | ForwardDiff | 250.456 ms | 245.088 ms | — | 0.98× | — | — |
| posteriordb | pilots | ForwardDiff | 1352.973 ms | 530.221 ms | 1215.44 ms | 0.39× | 1.11× | 0.44× |
| posteriordb | radon_county | ForwardDiff | 50.417 ms | 59.054 ms | — | 1.17× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_county_intercept | ForwardDiff | 68.746 ms | 55.369 ms | — | 0.81× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_hierarchical_intercept_centered | ForwardDiff | 2162.197 ms | 2050.569 ms | — | 0.95× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_hierarchical_intercept_noncentered | ForwardDiff | 29642.385 ms | 24599.692 ms | — | 0.83× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_partially_pooled_centered | ForwardDiff | 58.058 ms | 121.625 ms | — | 2.09× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_pooled | ForwardDiff | 12.376 ms | 19.19 ms | — | 1.55× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_centered | ForwardDiff | 102.146 ms | 81.913 ms | — | 0.8× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_noncentered | ForwardDiff | 249.456 ms | 349.728 ms | — | 1.4× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_slope_centered | ForwardDiff | 246.444 ms | 310.374 ms | 692.984 ms | 1.26× | 0.36× | 0.45× |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_intercept_slope_noncentered | ForwardDiff | 1029.731 ms | 833.326 ms | — | 0.81× | — | — |
| posteriordb | radon_variable_slope_centered | ForwardDiff | 111.718 ms | 93.64 ms | — | 0.84× | — | — |
| posteriordb | rats | ForwardDiff | 808.242 ms | 409.955 ms | 184.575 ms | 0.51× | 4.38× | 2.22× |
| posteriordb | seeds | ForwardDiff | 1034.742 ms | 549.106 ms | 581.548 ms | 0.53× | 1.78× | 0.94× |
| posteriordb | seeds_centered | ForwardDiff | 224.626 ms | 193.57 ms | — | 0.86× | — | — |
| posteriordb | seeds_stanified | ForwardDiff | 160.265 ms | 209.686 ms | — | 1.31× | — | — |
| posteriordb | sesame_one_pred_a | ForwardDiff | 118.941 ms | 120.302 ms | — | 1.01× | — | — |
| posteriordb | surgical_model | ForwardDiff | 102.962 ms | 91.372 ms | — | 0.89× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_daae_c | ForwardDiff | 241.285 ms | 230.875 ms | — | 0.96× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae | ForwardDiff | 202.651 ms | 216.105 ms | 192.306 ms | 1.07× | 1.05× | 1.12× |
| posteriordb | wells_dae_c | ForwardDiff | 191.385 ms | 145.072 ms | — | 0.76× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dae_inter | ForwardDiff | 181.227 ms | 180.844 ms | — | 1.0× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist | ForwardDiff | 794.319 ms | 569.944 ms | — | 0.72× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist100 | ForwardDiff | 31.346 ms | 59.372 ms | — | 1.89× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_dist100ars | ForwardDiff | 128.889 ms | 162.533 ms | — | 1.26× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_interaction | ForwardDiff | 313.27 ms | 313.301 ms | — | 1.0× | — | — |
| posteriordb | wells_interaction_c | ForwardDiff | 110.938 ms | 102.588 ms | — | 0.92× | — | — |
| tutorials | bayesian-linear-regression | ForwardDiff | 24.311 ms | 40.39 ms | 73.25 ms | 1.66× | 0.33× | 0.55× |
| tutorials | bayesian-logistic-regression | ForwardDiff | 38.718 ms | 14.678 ms | 64.397 ms | 0.38× | 0.6× | 0.23× |
| tutorials | bayesian-poisson-regression | ForwardDiff | 59.632 ms | 58.493 ms | 79.172 ms | 0.98× | 0.75× | 0.74× |
| tutorials | bayesian-time-series-analysis | ForwardDiff | 9896.021 ms | 9652.94 ms | — | 0.98× | — | — |
| tutorials | coin-flipping | ForwardDiff | 8.329 ms | 8.157 ms | 24.972 ms | 0.98× | 0.33× | 0.33× |
| tutorials | multinomial-logistic-regression | ForwardDiff | 153.144 ms | 200.774 ms | 447.851 ms | 1.31× | 0.34× | 0.45× |
| tutorials | probabilistic-pca | ForwardDiff | 1503.659 ms | 1995.026 ms | 1598.518 ms | 1.33× | 0.94× | 1.25× |

## Reproducing

```
julia --project=. bench/suite.jl                                    # PracticalBayes side, appends to bench/results/history.jsonl
julia --project=test/comparison_env test/comparison_env/generate_turing_reference.jl  # Turing side, appends to bench/results/history_turing.jsonl
julia --project=bench/bench_env bench/corpus_bench.jl               # PracticalBayes corpus, appends to bench/results/history_corpus.jsonl
julia --project=test/comparison_env test/comparison_env/corpus_bench_turing.jl  # Turing corpus subset, appends to bench/results/history_corpus_turing.jsonl
julia --project=. bench/generate_report.jl                          # regenerate this file
quarto render bench/report.qmd                                      # render to HTML
```
